nodes.name: 报错信息：请选择对应机型

parameters.query:
SELECT r.retroid_id
FROM mes.retroid r
INNER JOIN mes.joborder j ON r.joborder_id = j.joborder_id
INNER JOIN mes.product_info p ON j.product_id = p.product_id
WHERE p.product_model_id = {{ $json.body.product_model }}
  AND j.status != 2
  AND r.status != 3;

SELECT
  md.retroid_id,
  md.createtime,
  md.machine_data_id,
  md.procedure_detail_id,
  (md.data ->> 'Station')::text AS station,
  (md.data ->> 'Result')::text AS result,
  (md.data ->> 'Model')::text AS model,
  (md.data ->> 'uuid')::text AS uuid,
  md.data ->> 'Machine_id' AS machine_id,
  (md.data ->> 'file')::text AS file,
  (md.data ->> 'file')::text AS file_name,
  r.retroid,
  r.retroid_id,
  pd.procedure_name
FROM
  mes.machine_data md
JOIN
  mes.retroid r ON r.retroid_id = md.retroid_id
JOIN
  mes.procedure_detail pd ON pd.procedure_detail_id = md.procedure_detail_id
WHERE
  md.retroid_id IN ({{ $json.retroid_id ? $json.retroid_id : 'NULL' }})
  AND md.createtime >= '{{ $json.bgtime }}'::timestamp
  AND md.createtime <= '{{ $json.edtime }}'::timestamp
  AND md.procedure_detail_id IN (
    {{ $json.procedure_name
      ? "(SELECT procedure_detail_id FROM mes.procedure_detail WHERE procedure_name = '" + $json.procedure_name + "')"
      : '96,95,94,93,97,125,134,135,136,148,149,155,156,140,141'
    }}
  )

parameters.query:
SELECT 
  md.retroid_id, 
  md.createtime, 
  md.machine_data_id,
  md.procedure_detail_id,
  (md.data ->> 'Station')::text AS station,
  (md.data ->> 'Result')::text AS result,
  (md.data ->> 'Model')::text AS model,
  (md.data ->> 'uuid')::text AS uuid,
  md.data ->> 'Machine_id' AS machine_id,
  (md.data ->> 'file')::text AS file,
  (md.data ->> 'file')::text AS file_name,
  r.retroid,        
  r.retroid_id,
  pd.procedure_name
FROM 
  mes.machine_data md 
JOIN 
  mes.retroid r ON r.retroid_id = md.retroid_id
JOIN 
  mes.procedure_detail pd ON pd.procedure_detail_id = md.procedure_detail_id
WHERE 
 md.retroid_id IN (
  {{ $json.retroid_id ? $json.retroid_id : 'NULL' }}
)
  AND md.procedure_detail_id = {{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.procedure_name }}
  AND md.createtime >= '{{ $json.bgtime }}'::timestamp
  AND md.createtime <= '{{ $json.edtime }}'::timestamp
